title: Testing & Fake Support

classes.name: FakePendingDispatch
classes.purpose: No-op stub of PendingDispatch; returned by Pending* generators when a fake gateway is active to suppress real queue dispatching
key_methods: __construct(): void  // empty – skips real job binding
getJob(): mixed  // returns anonymous empty class

classes.name: TestCase
classes.purpose: Base test case that registers AiServiceProvider and PrismServiceProvider for all package tests

classes.name: AiMigration
classes.purpose: Base migration that overrides the connection to always use config('database.default'), ensuring package migrations run on the app's default DB

classes.name: FakeTextGateway
key_methods: streamText(string $invocationId, TextProvider, ...): Generator  // yields StreamStart, TextStart, TextDelta[], TextEnd, StreamEnd
protected nextResponse(TextProvider, string, string, Collection, ?array): mixed
protected marshalResponse(mixed, TextProvider, string, string, Collection, ?array): mixed  // handles string→TextResponse, array→StructuredTextResponse, Closure
onToolInvocation(Closure, Closure): self  // no-op in fake

classes.name: FakeEmbeddingGateway
key_methods: generateEmbeddings(EmbeddingProvider, string $model, array $inputs, int $dimensions, int $timeout=30): EmbeddingsResponse
protected marshalResponse(mixed, EmbeddingProvider, string, EmbeddingsPrompt): EmbeddingsResponse
protected generateFakeEmbeddings(int $count, int $dimensions): array  // delegates to Embeddings::fakeEmbedding()

classes.name: FakeAudioGateway
key_methods: generateAudio(AudioProvider, string $model, string $text, string $voice, ?string $instructions, int $timeout=30): AudioResponse
protected marshalResponse(mixed, AudioProvider, string, AudioPrompt): AudioResponse  // default: base64('fake-audio-content')

classes.name: FakeImageGateway
key_methods: protected marshalResponse(mixed, ImageProvider, string, ImagePrompt): ImageResponse  // default: base64('fake-image-content') wrapped in Collection<GeneratedImage>

classes.name: FakeTranscriptionGateway
key_methods: protected marshalResponse(mixed, ...): TranscriptionResponse  // default: 'Fake transcription text.' with one TranscriptionSegment

classes.name: FakeFileGateway
key_methods: protected marshalGetResponse(mixed, string $fileId): FileResponse  // default: FileResponse(fileId, 'text/plain', 'fake-content')

classes.name: FakeStoreGateway
key_methods: protected marshalGetResponse(StoreProvider, mixed, string $storeId): Store  // default: Store(id=storeId, name='fake-store')
addFile(StoreProvider, string $storeId, string $fileId, array $metadata=[]): string  // returns $fileId

traits.name: HasQueuedResponseCallbacks
traits.purpose: Used by Queued*Response classes to attach then/catch callbacks; skips callback registration when dispatchable is a FakePendingDispatch
key_methods: then(Closure $callback): self  // skips if dispatchable instanceof FakePendingDispatch
catch(Closure $callback): self  // skips if dispatchable instanceof FakePendingDispatch

key_relationships: FakePendingDispatch extends Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\PendingDispatch (overrides all methods as no-ops)
TestCase depends_on AiServiceProvider, PrismServiceProvider (registered via getPackageProviders)
HasQueuedResponseCallbacks trait checks instanceof FakePendingDispatch to suppress callback wiring
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration, PendingAudioGeneration, PendingImageGeneration, PendingTranscriptionGeneration all create FakePendingDispatch when fake gateway is active
Promptable::fake() returns FakeTextGateway; similar pattern in Audio, Embeddings, Image, Transcription, Reranking, Stores, Files facades
shared_pattern: All Fake*Gateway classes share: constructor(Closure|array $responses), $currentResponseIndex cursor, $preventStray* flag, nextResponse() / marshalResponse() pipeline, and a preventStray*() method. marshalResponse() resolves Closure responses, generates a default stub when null, or passes through typed response objects.
important_notes: FakePendingDispatch::getJob() returns an anonymous empty class — so HasQueuedResponseCallbacks::then/catch detect FakePendingDispatch via instanceof and simply skip wiring, preventing errors.
AiMigration::getConnection() returns config('database.default') — ensures package migrations are portable across apps without hardcoding a connection name.
TestCase bootstraps both AiServiceProvider and PrismServiceProvider so all AI capabilities and Prism text generation are available in tests.
The FakeStoreGateway also calls Files::fake() internally when $files=true in Stores::fake().
